# Cailin Mining & Civil

> Australia's only award-winning 1:1 live mine site machine operator training. Get nationally recognised mining and civil construction qualifications in Perth, Western Australia.

Cailin Mining & Civil (operated by Cailin Training, RTO 46489) delivers 1:1 machine operator training on a live mine site in Perth. We provide nationally recognised RII qualifications, unlimited training hours, and job placement assistance for excavator, front-end loader, articulated dump truck (moxy), roller, and watercart operations.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of Cailin Mining & Civil and our 1:1 live mine site training.
- [About](/about): Our story, values, milestones, and RTO 46489 credentials.
- [Courses](/courses): All training programs including bundles, short courses, full day, RPL, and VOC.
- [Contact](/contact): How to reach our Perth office (by appointment only).
- [Book](/book): Booking page for training courses.
- [CTF Funding](/ctf-funding): Construction Training Fund eligibility and rebate guidance.
- [Blog](/blog): Industry tips, success stories, and mining/civil news.

## Course pages
- [Course bundles](/courses/bundles): Multi-ticket training packages for higher employability.
- [Short courses ($600)](/courses/short-courses): Quick certification on a single machine.
- [Full day course](/courses/full-day): Unlimited return training on a single machine.
- [Verification of Competency (VOC)](/courses/voc): Quick competency verification.
- [Recognition of Prior Learning (RPL)](/rpl): Convert prior experience into qualifications.
- [Excavator training Perth](/courses/excavator-training-perth): RIIMPO320F & RIIMPO301E.
- [Excavator ticket](/courses/excavator): Standard excavator training pathway.
- [Front end loader](/courses/wheel-loader): RIIMPO304E loader operator training.
- [Moxy training Perth](/courses/moxy-training-perth): Articulated dump truck (RIIMPO337E).
- [Moxy ticket](/courses/moxy): Standard moxy training pathway.
- [Roller ticket](/courses/roller): RIIMPO317F roller operator training.
- [Watercart ticket](/courses/watercart): RIIMPO206D bulk water truck training.
